data.name: Forbidden Fantasy The RPG
data.detailed_description:
Embark on an unforgettable journey to the world Nephalia, teeming with peril, magic, and awe as you embark on a quest to rescue the realm from encroaching fog of corruption. Tailor your character, select weapons and classes, and enlist either virtuous or malevolent mercenaries to aid you in combat.

Join the female protagonist and her party as you explore the vast world consisting of 4 major nations filled with interesting dialogue, dangerous quests and nefarious enemies that will progressively shape your experience.

With every decision you make, the NPCs' reactions will change, unlocking hidden paths and endings that you won't want to miss!
Rest up and recover with camping mechanics but beware of enemy attacks if you sleep without a campfire!

Recruit allies with the mercenary system, each with unique skills and personalities that will assist you in your battles.
Equipment, item loots are generated based on the class you choose, so you will not waste any equipment on your playthroughs!
With over 1000+ items, weapons and equipment aiding you in your perilous adventurer, you will get to enjoy high replay value as they get carried over to the New Game+!

Get ready to make tough choices that will determine female protagonist's fate and uncover all the hidden endings that await in Forbidden Fantasy The RPG!!

data.short_description: A BDSM and Corruption themed JRPG styled for NSFW enthusiasts! Time, Day & Night System that affects how NPCs and enemies appear and respond. Fatigue & Willpower mechanics to challenge the player's time management. Campfire mechanics to restore fatigue, willpower and health!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: intel i5 or higher
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX Series
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: intel i7 or higher
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 3060 or higher
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: intel i5 or higher
  • Memory: 1024 MB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX Series
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: intel i7 or higher
  • Memory: 2048 MB RAM
  • Graphics: RTX 3060 or higher
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
